game_name: Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter

sub_pixel_system.notes: Space combat simulation; sub-pixel system not documented

special_mechanics.name: Spacecraft Flight Physics
special_mechanics.description: Space combat flight model with multiple pilotable craft including X-Wings, Y-Wings, TIE Fighters, TIE Bombers, Assault Gunboats, and B-Wings (in expansion). Physics governs squadron-based multiplayer combat.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article covering game overview, development, and reception. No specific movement parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data are documented in available sources. Game is a space combat simulator, not a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity mechanics do not apply.
sources_used: wikipedia: Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter
